name: Comparable

aliases.name: From
aliases.comment: A function to implement comparison for a given type of value.

values.name: default
values.comment:
The default implementation for comparison of values in Elm.
This function implements equality as well as ordering for some types of values - Custom types aren't supported.
values.type: Comparable.From comparable

name: Comparable.Dict

unions.name: Dict
unions.comment: A dictionary of keys and values.

values.name: diff
values.comment: Keep a key-value pair when its key does not appear in the second dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key otherValue -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create an empty dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Keep only the key-value pairs that pass the given test.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> (key -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Fold over the key-value pairs in a dictionary from lowest key to highest key.
values.type: (key -> value -> accumulator -> accumulator) -> accumulator -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> accumulator

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Fold over the key-value pairs in a dictionary from highest key to lowest key.
values.type: (key -> value -> accumulator -> accumulator) -> accumulator -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> accumulator

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert an association list into a dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> List.List ( key, value ) -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the value associated with a key.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> key -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Maybe.Maybe value

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a key-value pair into a dictionary. Replaces value when there is a collision.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> key -> value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Keep a key-value pair when its key appears in the second dictionary. Preference is given to values in the first dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a dictionary is empty.
values.type: Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: keys
values.comment: Get all of the keys in a dictionary, sorted from lowest to highest.
values.type: Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> List.List key

values.name: map
values.comment: Apply a function to all values in a dictionary.
values.type: (key -> value -> otherValue) -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key otherValue

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a key is in a dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> key -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: merge
values.comment:
The most general way of combining two dictionaries. You provide three
accumulators for when a given key appears:

1.  Only in the left dictionary.
2.  In both dictionaries.
3.  Only in the right dictionary.
    You then traverse all the keys from lowest to highest, building up whatever
    you want.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> (key -> value -> result -> result) -> (key -> value -> otherValue -> result -> result) -> (key -> otherValue -> result -> result) -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key otherValue -> result -> result

values.name: partition
values.comment:
Partition a dictionary according to some test. The first dictionary
contains all key-value pairs which passed the test, and the second contains
the pairs that did not.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> (key -> value -> Basics.Bool) -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> ( Comparable.Dict.Dict key value, Comparable.Dict.Dict key value )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a key-value pair from a dictionary. If the key is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> key -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a dictionary with one key-value pair.
values.type: key -> value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: size
values.comment: Determine the number of key-value pairs in the dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a dictionary into an association list of key-value pairs, sorted by keys.
values.type: Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> List.List ( key, value )

values.name: union
values.comment: Combine two dictionaries. If there is a collision, preference is given to the first dictionary.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the value of a dictionary for a specific key with a given function.
values.type: Comparable.From key -> key -> (Maybe.Maybe value -> Maybe.Maybe value) -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> Comparable.Dict.Dict key value

values.name: values
values.comment: Get all of the values in a dictionary, in the compare of their keys.
values.type: Comparable.Dict.Dict key value -> List.List value

name: Comparable.Set

unions.name: Set
unions.comment: Represents a set of unique values.

values.name: diff
values.comment:
Get the difference between the first set and the second. Keeps values
that do not appear in the second set.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: empty
values.comment: Create an empty set.
values.type: Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: filter
values.comment: Only keep elements that pass the given test.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> (value -> Basics.Bool) -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: foldl
values.comment: Fold over the values in a set, in compare from lowest to highest.
values.type: (value -> accumulator -> accumulator) -> accumulator -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> accumulator

values.name: foldr
values.comment: Fold over the values in a set, in compare from highest to lowest.
values.type: (value -> accumulator -> accumulator) -> accumulator -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> accumulator

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Convert a list into a set, removing any duplicates.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> List.List value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert a value into a set.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: intersect
values.comment: Get the intersection of two sets. Keeps values that appear in both sets.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a set is empty.
values.type: Comparable.Set.Set value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: map
values.comment: Map a function onto a set, creating a new set with no duplicates.
values.type: Comparable.From otherValue -> (value -> otherValue) -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set otherValue

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a value is in a set.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Basics.Bool

values.name: partition
values.comment:
Create two new sets. The first contains all the elements that passed the
given test, and the second contains all the elements that did not.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> (value -> Basics.Bool) -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> ( Comparable.Set.Set value, Comparable.Set.Set value )

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove a value from a set. If the value is not found, no changes are made.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: singleton
values.comment: Create a set with one value.
values.type: value -> Comparable.Set.Set value

values.name: size
values.comment: Determine the number of elements in a set.
values.type: Comparable.Set.Set value -> Basics.Int

values.name: toList
values.comment: Convert a set into a list, sorted from lowest to highest.
values.type: Comparable.Set.Set value -> List.List value

values.name: union
values.comment: Get the union of two sets. Keep all values.
values.type: Comparable.From value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value -> Comparable.Set.Set value
